description: next/ v2.0 — ISA-95 ProductDefinition = the recipe / SOLL master. One spec per article: SPEC_FOR the Article the order produces (the FO/recipe join point), optionally APPLIES_TO an EquipmentClass/line. Each controlled product property carries a TWO-TIER control band: warn (Warngrenze, inner) and action (Eingriffsgrenze, outer). The bands are validated against the measured actuals on OperationsResponse/SegmentResponse (ISA-95 Spec-vs-Actual). This is the MasterProductSpecification; the per-FO ControlProductSpecification is derived from it.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Display name of the product specification.

attributes.name: version_label
attributes.description: Functional spec/recipe version (independent of the profile SemVer).

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Lifecycle status, e.g. draft, released, obsolete.

attributes.name: article_ref
attributes.description: FK to Article.article_no (SPEC_FOR). The article this spec defines — the FO/recipe join point. First binding axis.

attributes.name: equipment_class_ref
attributes.description: Optional FK to an EquipmentClass/line the spec is restricted to (APPLIES_TO). Second binding axis.

attributes.name: param_name
attributes.description: Name of the controlled product property (e.g. line_speed, produced_thickness, area_weight).

attributes.name: target_value
attributes.description: Target / SOLL setpoint of the property.

attributes.name: warn_lo
attributes.description: Inner band lower limit — Warngrenze (warning tier).

attributes.name: warn_hi
attributes.description: Inner band upper limit — Warngrenze (warning tier).

attributes.name: action_lo
attributes.description: Outer band lower limit — Eingriffsgrenze (action tier).

attributes.name: action_hi
attributes.description: Outer band upper limit — Eingriffsgrenze (action tier).

attributes.name: unit
attributes.description: Unit of the property (UN/CEFACT code recommended).

attributes.name: updated_at
attributes.description: Last change. Server-managed and volatile on every read (sim-v5 returns a fresh value per GET), so promotion:never — kept in the snapshot but excluded from the change-trigger and never published on its own.

relationships.description: The specification applies to this article (article_ref -> Article.article_no). First recipe-binding axis.
Optionally restricted to an equipment class / line (equipment_class_ref). Second binding axis.

isa95.note: ISA-95 ProductDefinition (MasterProductSpecification). Carries the SOLL bands as a TWO-TIER control limit (warn=Warngrenze inner, action=Eingriffsgrenze outer); validated against the measured actuals on OperationsResponse/SegmentResponse (Spec-vs-Actual). The per-FO ControlProductSpecification is derived per order.
